title: Protection bubble
content:

{{Quote|I need you to join with me, so I can nudge the bubble higher, in the direction we want to go. I'll try to slide rocks off the back of the bubble, while I lift other rocks ahead of us, and I'll fill in those gaps before the ceiling collapses any lower. Do you see what I've got in mind?|Mara Jade Skywalker, asking Jaina Solo to help her create a protection bubble|<ref name="TNJO:BP" />}}
A '''Protection Bubble''', or '''bubble of safety''',<ref name="TNJO:BP" /> was a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force power/Legends|power]], probably related to [[Force barrier/Legends|Force barrier]]. With this ability, the user could create a defensive sphere around their body. It is described as a shimmering blue globe of energy. It could protect the user from a wide range of attacks, deflect laser blasts, defend against [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]], [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuums]] and even inflict certain amounts of damage upon contact with the enemy. Protection bubbles can also be used offensively. Should the user surround the attacker in a Protection bubble, it is possible the attacker will become a victim of their own attack, having been trapped within its destructive radius. Due to the extreme concentration needed to sustain the bubble however, the user would have to be momentarily immobile in order to enact the bubble, and sometimes, completely stationary in order to sustain it.<ref name="DB:PoD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref>

[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] and his former [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] trainer, [[Kas'im]], were [[Duel on Lehon|dueling]] on [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]] after Bane had left the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] and Kas'im had been sent to kill him. Bane overpowered Kas'im's [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|double-bladed lightsaber]] easily until Kas'im changed to his [[Jar'Kai/Legends|Jar'Kai]] style. Bane quickly lost ground but got himself out of the [[Temple of the Ancients]]. Bane then let out a massive shockwave. Kas'im used a protection bubble to survive the shockwave, but the temple came down on top of him and he was crushed to death.<ref name="DB:PoD" />

In a creative and desperate display, the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Worror Dowmat|Worror]] used a Protection bubble to “subdue” Darth Bane during the last moments of their [[Duel on Tython|duel]] on [[Tython/Legends|Tython]]. Worror trapped both he and Bane within the bubble to protect [[Johun Othone]] from the Dark Lord's barrage of [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]]. The lightning, however, was not strong enough to penetrate the bubble; instead of reaching its intended target (Othone), it ricocheted against the inner surface of the bubble, killing Worror and grievously electrocuting Darth Bane, though his apprentice was able to finish the battle and medevac her teacher.<ref name="DB:RoT">''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''</ref>

[[File:ProtectionBubble-Massacre.png|thumb|left|250px|Talzin in a protection bubble.]]
[[Mother (title)/Legends|Mother]] [[Talzin/Legends|Talzin]], a [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian]] [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]], utilized a variant of the protection bubble during the [[Battle of Dathomir/Legends|Battle of Dathomir]]. Like other [[Dathomir Magic|Nightsister magicks]], the shield was green. It deflected blaster fire from oncoming [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and was used along with [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]].<ref name="TCW:Massacre">{{TCW|Massacre}}</ref>

[[Cin Drallig/Legends|Cin Drallig]] used this power to protect himself while he meditated and healed during his duel with [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].<ref name="SW:RotSVG">[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' video game]]</ref>

[[Tash Arranda/Legends|Tash Arranda]] instinctively used this power to hold back the [[Enzeen]]. Later and more consciously she used it to protect herself from [[Spore]]. Her untrained use only had a duration of a few seconds each time before the bubble collapsed.<ref name="GF:EA">''[[Galaxy of Fear: Eaten Alive]]''</ref>

[[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Azard]] was skilled in the use of this technique, using it to protect himself from an explosion and a fall after his [[Massacre of New Coral City|duel]] with [[Imperial Knight]] [[Treis Sinde]].<ref name="L22:TWotD">[[Legacy (2006) 22|''Legacy'' (2006) 22]]</ref> Sinde himself employed a protection bubble while assisting [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] refugees on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].<ref name="L32:FAD,1">[[Legacy (2006) 32|''Legacy'' (2006) 32]]</ref> [[Cade Skywalker]] also used this to protect himself and [[Deliah Blue]] after [[Darth Maladi]]'s lab self destructed.<ref name="L46:M,4">[[Legacy (2006) 46|''Legacy'' (2006) 46]]</ref>
